title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Etempa Web Solutions Ltd
body: "Application number 5440  Applicant Etempa Solutions Limited objected to the name used by Etempa Web Solutions Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 31 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Etempa Web Solutions Ltd is changed to 16438779, Ltd. "
